attributes.action: Stop UK airbases being used by US aircraft for illegal war on Iran.
attributes.additional_details: The British public do not want dragged into another illegal war in the Middle East.
attributes.background:
Sir Keir Starmer has endangered the lives of British people by allowing United States Air Force to re-arm with missiles and refuel at our air bases. 

Trump has begun an illegal war and we do not want to be complicit or dragged into it. 

Stop UNITED STATES AIR FORCE using UK bases.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Stop allowing the US to use British bases for any action against Iran" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762916
